commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And you shall put some of your honor upon him, that all the congregation of the children of Israel may be obedient. Precepts, to accept of this office, (Calmet) and to discharge it with integrity. (Haydock) Glory, not that which shone on the face of Moses, as Onkelos would have it, but all the marks of distinction due to a chief magistrate, (Calmet) the insignia of his office. See Exodus xviii. (Salien) Treat him with respect, as your successor. (Menochius) Let him henceforward commence to exercise his authority before you, that all the people may hear and obey him. (Sararius) (Tirinus).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
